mapper.sql: id, class_id, campus_id, teacher_id, duty_date, duty_type, start_time, end_time, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into sys_class_duty (class_id, campus_id, teacher_id, duty_date, duty_type, start_time, end_time, remark) values (#{classId}, #{campusId}, #{teacherId}, #{dutyDate}, #{dutyType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update sys_class_duty set class_id = #{classId}, campus_id = #{campusId}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, duty_date = #{dutyDate}, duty_type = #{dutyType}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from sys_class_duty where duty_date = #{dutyDate} order by duty_type asc, campus_id asc, class_id asc, id asc
